title: Alya Kujou Custom Inventory
description: Alya Kujou Custom HUD (hotbar and inventory)
body:
Transform your Minecraft experience with the elegance of Alisa Mikhailovna Kujou. This resource pack replaces the standard, dull interfaces with a custom aesthetic inspired by Alya from Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian.

![inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5feb087fed5b3ab1b12d4bc544d146aad9f1d469_0.webp)

✨ Features

This pack focuses on a complete visual redesign of the user interface:

Complete GUI Redesign: All containers (Inventory, Chests, Furnaces, Crafting Tables, etc.) feature a custom Alya-themed skin.

Custom Hotbar.

Themed Status Bars: Custom icons for your Health bar that match Alya's aesthetic.

Vanilla Friendly: This is a UI-only pack. It won't change your blocks or world textures, meaning you can overlay it on top of any other texture pack!

🛠️ Compatibility

Requirement: No extra mods are required, but OptiFine or Iris is recommended for the best visual consistency.
